description: The process of increasing in size, number, or maturity; development toward fullness. 'Pelu' names what living things do—the expansion that is life expressing itself.
sound_symbolism: The word expands with life. 'Pe' pushes with expanding force, growth pressing outward. 'Lu' flows with increasing life, development continuing.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo pelu' (the growth). What 'molei' (evolve) produces over time. Related to 'lioru' (life) as expression to essence.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Regenerative growth—development that enriches rather than depletes.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Growth as natural—the unfolding that happens when conditions support flourishing.
